title: Basic CBC (DE) — uniform priors, 4 versions
summary: D-efficient CBC design under effects coding, uniform choice probabilities (no beta).

[["design-cbc::design-de"]]

versions = 4
tasks_per_version = 12

title: Bayesian DE with multi-draw priors
summary: Bayesian D-efficiency: average information across multiple beta draws.
